develop their communications skill and writing technique, which are vital to their career

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Core focus on 'Journalistic ethics,' combating 'misinformation,' and 'verification' directly supports accountable institutions (16.6) and public access to information (16.10).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Promoting a 'global perspective' and understanding 'Globalization' fosters the mindset for global partnerships and knowledge sharing (Target 17.16).
